synopsis: Imperial stormtroopers are on your trail, and there's only one place for you to hide. Coruscant's underworld is a bizarre maze of danger and fear. But in order to survive, you must find the strange wise man at its center. Your Mission: to travel to the heart of the underworld and escape your pursuers. May the Force be with you.
title: Star Wars Missions 15: Voyage to the Underworld
